name: webchat
description: Leech onto your logged-in web AI chat (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Qwen…) and run a full agentic coding loop in your editor — no API keys, no metered tokens.

enumDescriptions: Ask: review a diff before applying edits, and approve any tool/command runs.
Auto-edit: apply file changes automatically, but still approve tool/command runs.
Plan: return a step-by-step plan only — no edits, no commands.
Bypass: full access — apply edits AND run tools/commands automatically, no prompts.
webchat.agent.mode.description: Agent mode. Controls whether LeechCode asks before applying edits and running tools.

webchat.prompt.includeSelectionOnly.description: Use only the current editor selection when building context.

webchat.context.maxIndexChars.description: Paste-safe character budget for @codebase / /index whole-workspace indexing. The file tree is always included; file contents fill up to this many characters. Larger values risk freezing the web chat input on paste.

webchat.context.maxTreeChars.description: Character budget for the compact PROJECT_STRUCTURE.txt file tree included with every prompt so the model always knows the repository layout (and can read_file what it needs).

webchat.provider.maxMessageChars.markdownDescription: Per-provider max characters for a single chat message, e.g. `{ "chatgpt": 12000, "qwen": 8000 }`. WebChat caps the built prompt's context to fit this so messages aren't rejected as "too long". Editable per provider from the in-panel Settings.

webchat.provider.maxSessionChars.markdownDescription: Per-provider total character budget for one chat conversation, e.g. `{ "chatgpt": 240000, "claude": 600000 }`. Caps how much of a whole-codebase index WebChat delivers so it doesn't overflow the session window. Editable per provider from the in-panel Settings.

webchat.index.chunked.description: When @codebase / /index is too large for one message, deliver it as several ordered messages (the chat acknowledges each) instead of truncating it to a single paste-safe message.

webchat.index.maxChunks.description: Safety cap on the number of messages used to deliver a chunked codebase index. Files beyond this many messages are skipped.

webchat.bridge.port.description: Localhost port used by the IDE-to-browser bridge.

webchat.bridge.token.description: Shared local bridge token. Keep the browser extension token in sync.

webchat.browser.autoSubmit.description: Automatically submit prompts after inserting them into the web chat input.

webchat.agent.autoApplyFileChanges.description: Legacy fallback for applying validated WebChat agent file changes. Prefer webchat.agent.applyMode.

webchat.agent.applyMode.description: Controls whether WebChat asks, automatically applies, or never applies agent file changes.

webchat.diff.showOnApply.description: Open a before→after diff for each file WebChat applies, so you can see exactly what changed.

webchat.vision.enabled.description: Process attached/pasted images with your OWN local vision model instead of relying on the web chat's (limited) image support. The image's description/OCR is injected into the prompt as text.

webchat.vision.endpoint.markdownDescription: OpenAI-compatible chat-completions URL for local image analysis, e.g. Ollama `http://localhost:11434/v1/chat/completions` or LM Studio `http://localhost:1234/v1/chat/completions`.

webchat.vision.model.markdownDescription: Vision model name at the endpoint, e.g. `llava`, `llama3.2-vision`, `qwen2.5vl`, `minicpm-v`.

webchat.vision.apiKey.description: Optional bearer token for the vision endpoint (usually blank for local servers).

webchat.vision.prompt.default: Describe this image in detail and transcribe any visible text (OCR) exactly. Focus on anything relevant to a software/coding task (UI, code, errors, diagrams).
webchat.vision.prompt.description: Instruction sent to your local vision model for each image.

webchat.agent.autoRepairInvalidResponses.description: Ask the web chat for one corrected tool response when the returned agent JSON is malformed.

webchat.agent.maxRepairAttempts.description: Maximum automatic repair prompts to send for one malformed agent response.

webchat.session.maxContextTokens.description: Approximate total context-token budget for one web chat session before a fresh chat should be started.

webchat.session.maxInputTokens.description: Approximate input-token budget for one web chat session.

webchat.session.maxOutputTokens.description: Approximate output-token budget for one web chat session.

webchat.session.compactEveryPrompts.description: Ask the assistant for a compact development state after this many prompts.

webchat.session.rotateWhenBudgetRemainin.description: Start a fresh web chat when remaining session budget falls below this ratio.
